Seat 7: Villain2 (12000 in chips)

Villain2: posts the ante 250
Villain1: posts small blind 1000
Villain2: posts big blind 2000

Dealt to HeroName [Ah Ks]
ShortStack: raises 3150 to 5150 and is all-in
HeroName: raises 26600 to 31750 and is all-in
Villain1: folds
Villain2: calls 9750 and is all-in
*** FLOP *** [Td 8s 3c]
*** TURN *** [Td 8s 3c] [Kh]
*** RIVER *** [Td 8s 3c Kh] [5d]
*** SHOW DOWN ***
HeroName: shows [Ah Ks] (a pair of Kings)
Villain2: shows [Jd Jc] (a pair of Jacks)
ShortStack: shows [9s 9h] (a pair of Nines)
HeroName collected 13200 from side pot

Board [Td 8s 3c Kh 5d]
